title: Crop Mod
description: Smart farming mod with harvest stats HUD, crop protection, and camera snap. Prevents harvesting immature crops, protects your seed supply, and tracks your farming stats in real-time. Built for mcMMO Herbalism, works for everyone. Fully configurable
body:
# CropMod – No More Accidental Crop Breaks

Tired of accidentally breaking your crops before they're ready? **CropMod** is a simple, configurable mod that keeps your farm safe from misclicks. Includes harvest tracking and quality-of-life features for mcMMO Herbalism.

## What does it do by default?
- **Blocks harvesting crops that aren't fully grown.**  
  Never accidentally break wheat, carrots, potatoes, or any other crop before they're ready to harvest.

## What else can it do? (OFF BY DEFAULT - ENABLE IN MOD MENU)
With just a few tweaks, CropMod can:
- **Show a harvest statistics HUD** – Track crops harvested per session with live per-minute rates
- **Prevent crop destruction when you run out of seeds** (perfect for mcMMO Herbalism auto-replant)
- **Require a hoe to harvest crops** (for mcMMO players to activate the Herbalism ability)
- **Show particles when harvest is blocked**
- **Snap your camera for perfect row farming**
- **Enable or disable protection for each crop type**

All features are easily configured in ModMenu.

## Keybinds
- **P** – Toggle crop protection
- **O** – Toggle camera snap
- **H** – Toggle harvest stats HUD
- **Shift+H** – Reset session stats
- **Ctrl+H** – Drag to reposition HUD

## Made for everyone—ideal for mcMMO
CropMod was originally designed for mcMMO Herbalism, where auto-replant can destroy crops if you run out of seeds. With CropMod, you can require a seed buffer to guarantee safe auto-replant.  

But even in vanilla Minecraft, you'll appreciate never breaking crops too early again.

Need to quickly disable all protections for mass harvesting? Just press **P** to turn off the entire mod temporarily, then press **P** again to restore all your settings.

*Client-side only – works on any server, no installation required for others.*
